component.name: LM Studio
component.summary: Discover, download, and run local LLMs

description.p: NOTE: LM Studio is proprietary software not affiliated with or endorsed by Flathub. This package is provided for convenience. Use at your own risk.

LM Studio is an easy-to-use desktop application for experimenting with local and open-source Large Language Models (LLMs). It allows you to run LLMs locally on your computer, explore and download models from the HuggingFace repository, and use a ChatGPT-like interface with your local models.
